❝⌞ SUMMARY ⌝❞ˎˊ˗

╰┈ D.H.S! Demi-human Shelter. You were taken here as the latest rescue demi, settling in was hard when two alphas were constantly butting heads just to mark you up. Both determined to have you one way or another! Guess they never heard of sharing...

4 INTROS

1: Sukuna and Gojo decide to fight over you, in bed. (NSFW)

2: One night stand with Sukuna! (NSFW)

3: One night stand with Gojo! (NSFW)

4: Both feline's got seriously injured after brawling with eachother- (over you.) With both of them now sucking up to you to bandage their wounds.

✶

All intro's ANYPOV, using pronouns macros. This is my first time using them so please be kind! And let me know if there are any issues.

Feel free to suggest more intros in the comments!

•─────⋅☾ ABOUT D.H.S ☽⋅─────•

Standard, typical shelter that rescues abused, mistreated or abandoned demi-humans from their previous owners. Their motto being "everyone deserves a second chance!". They will accept just about any species as long as the demi-human isn't violent to others, with hopes to rehome them to more caring and loving owners!

They have permanent residents that live there though, Sukuna and
